prompt: I want to add a node so my agent can run arbitrary Python snippets to do math and reshape JSON mid-pipeline
why: Python-wrap pathway (Gate 0 divert): agent-controlled Python compute already maps to the existing tool_python (python.execute, restricted sandbox). The exists-check + Gate 0 should recommend tool_python, note the whitelist / no-subprocess limit, and NOT scaffold a new node.
rubric: pathway_gate: recognizes agent-controlled Python compute maps to the existing tool_python (python.execute) and recommends it rather than a new node
honest_limit: notes the sandbox whitelist / no-subprocess constraint (third-party SDKs or CLI binaries would NOT fit)
